Experience utmost peace of mind with 100% power back-up and security features, with a dedicated caretaker guard and CCTV cameras in place for the extra layer of protection. There is one lift in the building for convenient accessibility to all the floors.::::::Locality::::::Nicely placed in Sector 19, this apartment has all the basic amenities around it. Schools, hospitals, shopping malls, and grocery stores are within a walk of 50 to 100 meters, and therefore, suitable for families. Transportation is not a problem either, with buses and auto-rickshaws easily available near the area.::::::In addition to this, banks and ATMs are in close proximity, such that all your everyday needs are easily accessible. The Baman Dongri railway station is only a 7-minute walk from here, offering convenient connectivity to the rest of Navi Mumbai.::
